# Phase 24: TF.js Native Backend with Dynamic Fallback - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-01

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Training and inference use @tensorflow/tfjs-node by default via dynamic import(), with automatic fallback to @tensorflow/tfjs pure JS when the native addon fails (e.g. Alpine/musl)

</domain>
